titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 79: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 79. (A.R. No. 593 of 1920.) UḌAIYĀRKUḌI, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall, central shrine, Anantēśvarasvāmin temple.

This inscription records a gift of 150 kaḻañju of gold by Nandi Puttaṉ alias Sembiyaṉ Mūvēndavēḷāṉ of Paṉaippākkam in Kīḻamūr-nāḍu for the feeding of five brāhmaṇas at midday daily in the temple of Tiruvanantīśvarattu-uḍaiyār at Vīranārayaṇachaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēyam on the north bank (of the river Kāvēri). The amount is stated to have been invested in the reclamation of a vēli of land in Vēṭṭamaṅgalam, (a hamlet) of Māṅguḍi in Viḷattūr-nāḍu of the dēvar (possibly in the dēvadāna of the above said god) for contributing the yield for the above said feeding. It is also mentioned that five plates and five basins were presented (evidently for the feeding of the five brāhmaṇas). The sabhā (apparently Vīranārāyaṇachchaturvēdimaṅgalam) undertook to ensure the carrying out of the benefaction.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. XIX No. 264.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī .
kopparake
saripaṉmaṟkki
yāṇṭu 10Āvatu va
ṭakarai brahmadeyam
śrī viranārāyaṇaccatu
rvvedimaṅkalattu tiruva
ṉan=tiśvarattu Uṭaiyār ko
yililey candrādittavaṟ
nicatam Ayvar brāhmaṇa
rkku madhyānattu vuṭṭuvataṟ
kku muṉaippāṭik kiḻāmur nā
ṭṭu paṉaippākkattu maruta
vaṉ nan=tipūttanākiya cem
piyaṉ muvain=taveḷāṉ
kuṭutta poṉ nūṟṟampatiṉ
kaḻañcum koṇṭu Itteva
(va)r viḷattūrnāṭṭu māṅkuṭi veṭṭamaṅkalattu veliccey
Oru vakaikaḷāka Ippoṉṉum Uṭpaṭa ve ṭu tirutti
ṉamaiyil Ivvūr bhogatte koṇṭu kuṭuttom
mum Ik koyilil śrīkā mu
ṭṭāme Ūṭṭuvatākavum tālam Añcum vaṭṭil A(ñ)
ñcum Itu mahāsabhaiyār rakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 79 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
